name: openEuler doc SIG

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler doc SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The doc SIG aims to provide users with documents and knowledge related to the openEuler,establish links between the software and users for better community experience.. The SIG has 6 core members and maintains 3 repositories in the Documentation and Internationalization domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler doc SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler doc SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at doc@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler doc SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler doc SIG maintains 3 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/doc.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler doc SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler doc SIG has 6 Maintainers, including: amy, hujun, suqin. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
